about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Computer Science student at UFRRJ and a full-stack developer passionate about building complete web products — from database modeling to interface details.
about.paragraph2: Beyond the JavaScript ecosystem, I have a strong interest in systems programming: I write C, study high-performance computing and enjoy optimizing algorithms to the limit.
